steps.expected: 5*time.Second marshals as '5s', 2m30s marshals as '2m30s', round-trip preserves values
steps.observed: PASS - output contains '5s' and '2m30s', Unmarshal recovers exact duration values

steps.expected: 100ms and 24h edge cases marshal correctly and round-trip
steps.observed: PASS - short (100ms) and long (24h) durations round-trip with value preservation

steps.expected: Tests check Go duration string format and round-trip fidelity
steps.observed: Tests verify output contains duration strings (not raw nanoseconds), and Unmarshal recovers exact time.Duration values via reflect.DeepEqual-equivalent checks

steps.expected: time.Date(2023,11,1,0,0,0,0,UTC) marshals as '2023-11-01T00:00:00Z' ISO8601 Zulu, round-trip preserves value
steps.observed: PASS - output contains '2023-11-01T00:00:00Z', Unmarshal recovers time.Time with Equal() confirmation

steps.expected: Test checks ISO8601 Zulu format and round-trip fidelity
steps.observed: Test creates specific UTC time, verifies ISO8601 string in output, and round-trips via Unmarshal with time.Equal comparison

assertions.title: Ambiguous string values must be quoted

steps.expected: All 13 ambiguous string values (bool literals, numeric strings, variable refs, bcrypt) marshal quoted and round-trip as strings
steps.observed: PASS - all 13 subtests pass: true/false/yes/no/on/off/TRUE/False, 123, -456, 3.14, $FOO, $2a$11$hash all round-trip as string type

steps.expected: Table-driven test covers all categories: bool literals (all 6 + case variants), integers, floats, variable refs, bcrypt
steps.observed: Test marshals each value in a string field, parses output, type-asserts result is string (not bool/int/float), and verifies exact value match

summary: Tested 4 assertions (10 test functions total): all 4 passed. VAL-MARSHAL-020: time.Duration fields marshal as Go duration strings and round-trip correctly. VAL-MARSHAL-021: time.Time marshals as ISO8601 Zulu format with round-trip fidelity. VAL-MARSHAL-022: All 13 ambiguous string value categories are properly quoted to preserve string type. VAL-MARSHAL-023: Channels, functions, and complex numbers return descriptive errors (not panics); nil/empty-struct edge cases handled correctly.
